CustomTheme.PageDescription: Build a custom visual theme with colour controls, typography, and background image settings.
CustomTheme.SectionColorsDesc: Pick a primary colour and generate a full palette, or fine-tune individual colours. Each field below explains exactly which Matomo UI element it changes.
CustomTheme.ResetConfirm: This will remove all custom colours, typography settings, local fonts, and the background image. Are you sure?
CustomTheme.SectionBackgroundDesc: Upload an image to display behind all Matomo pages. Accepted formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP, SVG. Maximum file size: 5 MB.
CustomTheme.SectionBackgroundHowto: After uploading, adjust the display options below and click “Save background settings” to apply.
CustomTheme.SectionBackgroundStyleHelp: Cover stretches the image to fill the screen. Contain fits the whole image inside the screen. Tile repeats it.
CustomTheme.SectionBackgroundOverlayHelp: A tint overlay is applied on top of the image to keep text readable. Increase opacity to make the background more subtle.
CustomTheme.SectionBackgroundBlurHelp: Blurs the background image. Useful when the image is busy and would distract from the content.
CustomTheme.SectionTypographyDesc: Set a custom local font stack for Matomo and optionally upload one local font file hosted on this server. External font URLs are not supported.
CustomTheme.FontFamilyBaseHelp: Choose a font family preset. Uploaded local font (if any) is applied before this fallback stack.
CustomTheme.ShapeRoundnessHelp: Controls corner radius for buttons, fields, cards, widgets, and UI blocks.
CustomTheme.LocalFontHelp: Upload WOFF2, WOFF, TTF, or OTF (max 5 MB). Uploaded local font is prepended to the base stack. Only use locally hosted fonts with free/open licenses or valid commercial rights.
